rds.dbproxyendpoint.DBProxyEndpointName.Docs: The name of the DB proxy endpoint to create.

rds.dbproxyendpoint.DBProxyName.Docs: The name of the DB proxy associated with the DB proxy endpoint that you create.

rds.dbproxyendpoint.Tags.Docs: An optional set of key-value pairs to associate arbitrary data of your choosing with the proxy.

rds.dbproxyendpoint.TargetRole.Docs: A value that indicates whether the DB proxy endpoint can be used for read/write or read-only operations.  Valid Values: `READ_WRITE | READ_ONLY`

rds.dbproxyendpoint.VpcSecurityGroupIds.Docs: The VPC security group IDs for the DB proxy endpoint that you create. You can specify a different set of security group IDs than for the original DB proxy. The default is the default security group for the VPC.

rds.dbproxyendpoint.VpcSubnetIds.Docs: The VPC subnet IDs for the DB proxy endpoint that you create. You can specify a different set of subnet IDs than for the original DB proxy.
